agent_name.description: Name of the agent or representative

customer_name.description: Name of the customer or caller

main_topics.description: Main topics or issues discussed in the call

outcomes.description: Resolutions or outcomes achieved during the call

action_items.description: Follow-up actions with responsible party and optional due context

due.description: Due date or timeframe if mentioned, else null

sentiment.description: Overall sentiment of the call from the customer's perspective

reference_ids.description: Policy numbers, claim IDs, or other reference identifiers mentioned

churn_risk.description: Likelihood this customer churns soon. Weigh tenure, loyalty tier, lifetime value, open-claim friction, and any churn_signals from the CRM record — not just the call's tone.

churn_risk_rationale.description: One or two sentences justifying churn_risk. MUST cite specific CRM facts (e.g. tenure, tier, open claim status, prior interactions) and/or transcript moments — not generic reasoning.

personalized_next_actions.description: Concrete, CRM-aware next steps for the agent or company to retain and serve THIS customer. Retention-first when churn signals are present.

rationale.description: Why, grounded in a specific CRM fact (tenure, tier, open claim, lapsed discount, payment history, prior interaction)

cross_sell_opportunities.description: Products to consider offering LATER. Only products in products_offered_by_carrier that the customer does NOT already hold. Empty if now is a bad time (e.g. an open claim) — say so via personalized_next_actions instead.

product.description: A product the customer does not currently hold

rationale.description: Why it fits this customer, referencing CRM context
